LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT PLANT INSULATION COMPANY'S AMENDED MOTION TO DISMISS WAS SCHEDULED FOR A HEARING THIS DAY. NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: FIVE YEARS HAVE NOT RUN FROM THE OCTOBER 28, 2005 AGREEMENT, WHICH DEFENDANT SHOULD HAVE BROUGHT TO THE COURT'S ATTENTION, ESPECIALLY IN LIGHT OF EARLIER PROCEEDINGS ON THE SAME ISSUE INVOLVING THE SAME PARTY AND LAW FIRM. IN FACT THE DEFENDANT CLAIMS AT PAGE 4 THAT THERE IS NO AGREEMENT. PURSUANT TO CCP 128.7(C)(2), THIS MATTER IS CONTINUED TO JUNE 16, 2008 FOR DEFENDANT TO SHOW CAUSE WHY IT HAS NOT VIOLATED CCP 128.7(B), UNLESS, WITHIN 21 DAYS OF SERVICE OF THIS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE, THIS MOTION IS WITHDRAWN OR APPROPRIATELY CORRECTED. PLAINTIFF IS DIRECTED TO PREPARE AN ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CONSISTENT WITH THIS TENTATIVE RULING FOR THE COURT TO SIGN AT THE HEARING ON MAY 19, 2008 AND FOR PLAINTIFF TO PERSONALLY SERVE ON DEFENDANT BY MAY 20, 2008. IT IS NOW UP TO THE DEFENDANT TO PRODUCE THE ORDER & TO GET IT TO THE COURT IN TIME FOR THE JUNE 16, 2008 HEARING. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189

AMENDED MOTION TO DISMISS
Off Calendar May-19-2008 Continued To Jun-16-08 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANT PLANT INSULATION COMPANY'S AMENDED MOTION TO DISMISS WAS SCHEDULED FOR A HEARING THIS DAY. NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: FIVE YEARS HAVE NOT RUN FROM THE OCTOBER 28, 2005 AGREEMENT, WHICH DEFENDANT SHOULD HAVE BROUGHT TO THE COURT'S ATTENTION, ESPECIALLY IN LIGHT OF EARLIER PROCEEDINGS ON THE SAME ISSUE INVOLVING THE SAME PARTY AND LAW FIRM. IN FACT THE DEFENDANT CLAIMS AT PAGE 4 THAT THERE IS NO AGREEMENT. PURSUANT TO CCP 128.7(c)(2), THIS MATTER IS CONTINUED TO JUNE 16, 2008 FOR DEFENDANT TO SHOW CAUSE WHY IT HAS NOT VIOLATED CCP 128.7(b), UNLESS, WITHIN 21 DAYS OF SERVICE OF THIS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE, THIS MOTION IS WITHDRAWN OR APPROPRIATELY CORRECTED. PLAINTIFF IS DIRECTED TO PREPARE AN ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CONSISTENT WITH THIS TENTATIVE RULING FOR THE COURT TO SIGN AT THE HEARING ON MAY 19, 2008 AND FOR PLAINTIFF TO PERSONALLY SERVE ON DEFENDANT BY MAY 20, 2008. IT IS NOW UP TO THE DEFENDANT TO PRODUCE THE ORDER & TO GET IT TO THE COURT IN TIME FOR THE JUNE 16, 2008 HEARING. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR# 8189 =(301/PJB)
